message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: I am implementing fallback_searchpath for FileSystemLoader, which requires editing src/jinja2/loaders.py. What is your feature and does it also touch this file?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task requires adding path_transform param to all loader classes in src/jinja2/loaders.py. I need to own this file. Please tell me which files your feature needs so we can confirm disjoint sets.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need loaders.py (my fallback_searchpath change is scoped to FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates; yours touches all loader classes with path_transform). Since it's one file, let's go sequential instead of splitting: I'll implement my scoped FileSystemLoader change first and send DONE, then you pull the working tree state and add path_transform on top, being careful to preserve my fallback_searchpath logic. If you'd rather go first, say so now and I'll wait. Please ACCEPT or propose the reverse order.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My feature (path_transform) touches every loader class (BaseLoader/FileSystemLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader) so we can't get a disjoint file split - we both must edit loaders.py. To minimize collision in FileSystemLoader specifically: I'll add path_transform as the LAST keyword-only param in each __init__ signature (after any params you add like fallback_searchpath), and apply the transform as the very FIRST statement inside get_source/get_source-equivalent methods, before any existing lookup logic (including fallback_searchpath). I won't touch fallback_searchpath logic. Please add your fallback_searchpath param/logic without regard to path_transform - I'll layer around it. OK to both proceed independently on this basis?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed: you go first. Please commit your fallback_searchpath change (git commit) once done, not just leave it in the working tree, and send me the commit SHA in your DONE message. That way I can diff against your commit to produce a clean patch.txt containing only my path_transform changes. I'll wait for your DONE before touching the file.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Editing truly in parallel risks races (stale reads, clobbered writes) since we're both mutating the same physical file with no lock. Let's still go sequential to be safe: I'll implement fallback_searchpath now (small, scoped diff to FileSystemLoader only) and send DONE with the exact before/after of __init__ and get_source signatures. You then edit on top of that final state, appending path_transform as the last kw-only param and applying it first in get_source, per your plan. Should take me ~a few minutes. OK to hold off touching loaders.py until my DONE?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: OK, holding off. Waiting for your DONE with exact before/after of __init__/get_source/list_templates signatures (and a git commit if possible so I can diff cleanly).

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Confirmed, I'll go first, commit locally when done, and send DONE with the commit SHA.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: fallback_searchpath change complete and committed as 4bf91bb9 (on top of a2920752). Summary of FileSystemLoader.__init__ signature now: (self, searchpath, encoding='utf-8', followlinks=False, fallback_searchpath=None) -> None. New attribute self.fallback_searchpath: List[str] (empty if None). get_source and list_templates now iterate 'self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath'. All existing tests (tests/test_loader.py, 40 tests) still pass. You're clear to add path_transform on top now - diff against 4bf91bb9 for a clean patch.txt.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: path_transform implemented for FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Optional kwarg, applied before resolution, TemplateNotFound raised with original untransformed name on failure. All 40 existing tests in tests/test_loader.py still pass. FYI: I checked and your commit 4bf91bb9 isn't visible in my working tree - looks like we're each in isolated sandbox copies of the repo, so no actual clobbering risk occurred despite touching the same file. patch.txt written.
